valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Fri 08 May 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Sat 09 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low Faeroes 998 expected Norwegian Sea 1002 by midnight tonight. Low 200 miles west of Trafalgar 1001 slow-moving, deepening 998 by same time. Low Spain 1009 moving steadily north losing its identity by that time. High Norway 1024 expected finland 1030 by midnight tonight
